suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit guidance for when to use parallel subagent delegation for large repetitive refactors to reduce completion time.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review err-wrap-cmd-remaining captured worker feedback recommending this addition in handoff skillFeedback.suggestedChanges.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify constant-extraction guidance so it does not conflict with grep-based validation commands (const-block member lines are currently still counted by validators).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Review err-extract-duration-constants notes AGENTS.md suggests const blocks while validation-contract VAL-ERR-008..013 grep filters can miscount const-block lines as inline literals.
